case_title: JAMES R WILSON VS. DONALD C PIPKINS

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. HEARING SET FOR OCT-30-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff James R. Wilson, Executor of the Estate of James T. Johnson.
Plaintiff was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Donald C. Pipkins.
Amended default was entered on August 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff James R. Wilson, Executor of the Estate of James T. Johnson, and against the Defaulted Defendant Donald C. Pipkins as follows:

Damages/Principal - $76,298.66.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,932.40.
Attorney's Fees - $2,700.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $84,386.06.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
